title: MetroPack IR
description: MetroPack is a pack that adds metro trains from CIS countries.
body:
# RU:
### MetroPack IR - это пак для мода [IR](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-railroading), добавляющий подвижной состав метрополитенов стран СНГ.
Не забудьте установить [UMC](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-mod-core) и [TrackAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/track-api)

# EN:
### MetroPack IR is a resource pack for [IR](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-railroading) mod that adds rolling stock from CIS metros.
Don't forget to install [UMC](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-mod-core) и [TrackAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/track-api)


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/QUMFZOUrWpk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## **Список поездов/Trains list:**
- 81-703 E
- 81-502 Ema502
- 81-710 Ezh3/Em508t
- 81-715.2 "I"
- ES720
- 81-717 "Nomernoy" (different variants/различные вариации)
- 81-540.2 "Alien"
- 81-540.7 "Ant"
- 81-720 "Yauza"
- 81-740.1 "Rusich"
- 81-760 "Oka"
- 81-760A/B "Eggplant"
- 81-765 "Moscow"
- 81-775 "Moscow_2020"
- 81-775.2 "Moscow_2024"

![81-717.5 "MGT_brand" and 81-717.5M "Red_Arrow"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uqHbSevk/images/993c917a13a06bf22b8d44aac10aa76f55fd5afb.png)
